description: Style Noteallen solly was formed in 1744 in Nottingham, England. Their handbags are creatively engineered to cater to the woman of today. Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leatherette clutch. With classy stitch detailing, this bag in glossy red makes a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsHas one roomy zipped compartment and an inner zipped compartmentTwo metallic rectangular handles for carrying easeStitch design on the front and back and brand name embossed on a small placard looped through the chain strapMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 17 cmWidth: 34 cm
